repos.author: Fincept-Corporation
repos.name: FinceptTerminal
repos.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
repos.summary: A comprehensive finance terminal with market analytics, investment research tools, and economic data visualization — targeted at traders and analysts who want an all-in-one data-driven decision-making platform.

repos.author: thunderbird
repos.name: thunderbolt
repos.description: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.
repos.summary: From the Thunderbird email client team, this project lets users choose their own AI models and own their data — a move toward AI portability and against vendor lock-in.

repos.author: tractorjuice
repos.name: arc-kit
repos.description: Enterprise Architecture Governance & Vendor Procurement Toolkit
repos.summary: A toolkit for enterprise architecture governance and vendor procurement — helps organizations manage technology decisions, assess vendors, and govern their IT landscape.

repos.author: openai
repos.name: openai-agents-python
repos.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
repos.summary: OpenAI's official Python framework for building multi-agent workflows — designed to be lightweight yet powerful, making it easy to coordinate multiple AI agents to work together on complex tasks.

repos.author: pingdotgg
repos.name: t3code
repos.summary: A TypeScript project from pingdotgg — specific details limited from available metadata, but trending in the TypeScript ecosystem today.

repos.author: paperless-ngx
repos.name: paperless-ngx
repos.description: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents
repos.summary: A polished, community-maintained document management system for digitizing, indexing, and archiving paper documents. Supports scanning, full-text search, and organization — great for going paperless at home or in a small office.

repos.author: ruvnet
repos.name: RuView
repos.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
repos.summary: A Rust-based project that uses ambient WiFi signals to perform real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — privacy-preserving since it requires no cameras or video footage.

repos.author: EvoMap
repos.name: evolver
repos.description: The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai
repos.summary: An AI agent self-evolution engine based on the Genome Evolution Protocol (GEP) — allows AI agents to improve themselves over time through structured evolutionary mechanisms.

repos.author: BasedHardware
repos.name: omi
repos.description: AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do
repos.summary: A hardware + software AI assistant (built with Dart/Flutter) that monitors your screen and conversations to proactively give contextual advice — essentially an always-on AI copilot for daily life.

repos.author: Donchitos
repos.name: Claude-Code-Game-Studios
repos.description: Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.
repos.summary: A meta-project that turns Anthropic's Claude Code into an entire game development studio using 49 coordinated AI agents with 72 workflow skills — replicating a real studio hierarchy from concept to shipped game.
